as well as this facility's most intriguing tool, a search protocol capable of tracking down codes to the region's nuclear silos.

and no one go. But their methods were too extreme for some among their cadre. This led to their downfall.

We have managed to restore the search protocol, our earlier residents designed to track down the silo launch and access codes.

There is a local militia, the Brotherhood of Steel. Our intelligence suggests they may have found a way to determine which is this Master Fisher.
The codes required to utilize these silos are harder to come by, but your efforts to reestablish severed connections have helped to that end.
Thanks to our resolidified connection to the Kovac, we have been able to catalog all of the Fisher sites across the region, which we are transmitting to you now.
There are three regional silos, the location of which we are transmitting to you. Now.
But there is still the chance these weapons could be used to noble ends. As you know doubt have seen, there is a plague haunting all life in Appalachia.
Transforming man and beast alike into monstrosities, freaks. The signals we intercepted refer to the spreaders of this plague as Scorch Beasts.
If you can determine which fisher houses this central nest, the blowback from the blast should be powerful enough to seal all the fishers with a single ionizing strike.
This space was designed to serve multiple purposes. A battle station to wage war against America's foes.
A repository for the military's experimental weapons schematics, and, most crucially, the military's window into Appalachia's nuclear arsenal.

I killed a bunch of them. See, that's like a resignation letter.

I heard someone stole a ton of armor from the settlers again and stashed it in a couple caches for safekeeping. I think I've found one. Let's get it!
Ah, we have a psychic on the network, and he's convinced that there's a cursed item out there causing grief to the world. Ah, said we'd pick it up.
I heard that Colt is using this stash to hide some of their supplies again. You know what that means. Robin blind and don't look back.
Someone on the radio network said they had a dream about a stash of goodies. Not sure if it's real, but our dreams have never been wrong, kinda.
Yeah, I knew you'd be interested.
Networks reporting that the cult has been doing something strange again. There's an infection, and we need to call whatever it's touched.
Ugh, I heard something strange is going on. Something released a gas that causes aggression, maybe? That's the word on the network, anyway.
Some sickness is causing serious behavioral problems lately. Probably you should destroy whatever has it so it doesn't spread.
Did I mention that old psychic on the radio network? Get this, they saw several murders recently. Sacrifices. We need you to stop them.
Psychic ping the network about this one turns out we might know where to look for that missing person after all Wanna be a hero

I'll be real. I know the cult is behind this one.
I got a cryptic message over the network, and I honestly don't know who it's from. Could be a trap.
Nobody wants to talk about it anymore. It's like the network is scared. It happens sometimes, but it always chills my bones.
